scripts.build:rules: esbuild rules/archive-before-execute.ts rules/head-of-list-query.ts rules/missing-ensure-decimal.ts rules/missing-positive-amount.ts rules/unbounded-fields.ts rules/unguarded-division.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=rules
scripts.build:examples: esbuild examples/choice-param-shadows-field.ts examples/consuming-choice-signatory-controller.ts examples/function-ledger-actions.ts examples/no-bare-contractid-field.ts examples/no-create-in-nonconsuming.ts examples/no-trace.ts examples/template-requires-ensure.ts examples/unguarded-division-ast.ts examples/unqualified-da-import.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=examples/dist --banner:js="// Compiled from TypeScript; pass this JavaScript file to daml-lint --rules."
scripts.check:types: npm run check:authoring-types && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p rule-authoring/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check:examples-clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=fs.readdirSync('examples').filter((f)=>f.endsWith('.js'));if(files.length){console.error('Top-level generated example JS belongs in examples/dist: '+files.join(', '));process.exit(1);}"
scripts.check:rules: npm run check:types && npm run build:rules && npm run build:examples && npm run check:examples-clean && npm run check:authoring-package && git diff --exit-code -- rules examples rule-authoring tools package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json
